# Transcript
**KAI ST*
* TOY PATRO 
* *RESBEYTHN *
WN APANTWN OSTIS
ATROKLEA THN EYNO
*I PROS AYTON KAI OS
I TWN CRHMATWN YPOL
***ELHQ*NAI IATRO
YTHI OPWS AN SWQNZ D
QENTI PRESBYTHI E
*N TOY DHMOY   DDDRACM
* STHLHNDD   ETERAS TW
I KATA PRYTANEIAN EK
MAT ANALISKOM*NWN T
AI DE TON HKONTA PARA
*I XENIA EIS TO PRYTA
N EPIMELHQHNAI DE A
HGON THS KOMIDHS
 WS ASFALES *
E*
